6. For custom/corporate email, you may need to enter server details manually

s.tutorial:
Run these commands against your cluster:
```
kubectl create serviceaccount skyline -n default
kubectl create clusterrolebinding skyline-admin --clusterrole=admin --serviceaccount=default:skyline
kubectl create token skyline -n default --duration=8760h
```
Copy the output token and paste it above.
